findings.evidence: `Prod.lean:19-21` says the bundled `ComoduleCat` product/coproduct/biproduct instances are separate; `rg -n "ComoduleCat\.(prod|coprod|biproduct)|HasBinaryBiproducts|HasBinaryProducts|HasBinaryCoproducts|BinaryBiproduct|IsLimit|IsColimit" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean` finds no such declarations, while the roadmap target is the finite-dimensional comodule category at `TauCetiRoadmap/ReductiveGroups/README.md:128-131`.
findings.fix: Add the bundled `ComoduleCat` binary product/coproduct/biproduct declarations, or move this PR out of the representation-category target and expose it only as a clearly scoped unbundled prerequisite.
findings.issue: The file explicitly leaves the bundled `ComoduleCat` product/coproduct/biproduct instances to a later layer, so downstream category-level representation code cannot use this as a binary product/coproduct/biproduct API.

summary: The unbundled product-comodule API is characterized and the implementation helpers are private, but the public surface still stops short of the bundled category interface needed by the stated representation-category target.
